basic_details.short_information: Odisha Electricity Regulatory Commission (OERC) Ombudsman Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website www.orierc.org. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the OERC Ombudsman Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/Engineering/Economics/Finance/Industry/Civil Service/Consumer Affairs or person of eminence, Ability to read and write Odia
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/Engineering/Economics/Finance/Industry/Civil Service/Consumer Affairs or person of eminence. Must be able to read and write Odia. Preference for electricity sector experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month consolidated + Rs. 12,000/- HRA

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.orierc.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download OERC Ombudsman Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.odisha_electricity_regulatory_commission: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/Engineering/Economics/Finance/Industry/Civil Service/Consumer Affairs or person of eminence, Ability to read and write Odia

content_sections.heading: OERC Ombudsman Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OERC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OERC Ombudsman Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OERC Ombudsman Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/Engineering/Economics/Finance/Industry/Civil Service/Consumer Affairs or person of eminence. Must be able to read and write Odia. Preference for electricity sector experience.

content_sections.heading: OERC Ombudsman Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month consolidated + Rs. 12,000/- HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.orierc.org. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Ombudsman post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Ombudsman post released by the Odisha Electricity Regulatory Commission (OERC) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Ombudsman position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in relevant fields like Legal, Engineering, Economics, Finance, Industry, Civil Service, or Consumer Affairs. Ability to read and write Odia is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Ombudsman post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Ombudsman post is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Ombudsman role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Ombudsman post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month along with Rs. 12,000/- HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for OERC Ombudsman recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Ombudsman recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment involves two main stages: shortlisting of eligible applicants based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the OERC Ombudsman position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the notification via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of OERC?
faq.answer: The official website of the Odisha Electricity Regulatory Commission (OERC) is www.orierc.org. Candidates can visit this website for more details and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Does experience in the electricity sector get preference?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have experience in the electricity sector, as mentioned in the eligibility criteria for the Ombudsman post.
